title: cmd/task/main.go DI wiring (Store, Clock, IDGen)
acceptance_criteria: main.go wires concrete adapters: fsstore.New for Store, real clock for Clock; IDGen stub returns deterministic strings (real ULID arrives in Phase 3).
cli.Deps now embeds the usecase.Deps; verbs pull only what they need.
Workspace auto-discovery walks up from cwd looking for .tasks/ (per §18 recommendation).
